detectors.description:
Reentrancy in PERSONAL_BANK.Collect(uint256) (PERSONAL_BANK.sol#81-105):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (PERSONAL_BANK.sol#93)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= _am (PERSONAL_BANK.sol#97)
	PERSONAL_BANK.balances (PERSONAL_BANK.sol#9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- PERSONAL_BANK.Collect(uint256) (PERSONAL_BANK.sol#81-105)
	- PERSONAL_BANK.Deposit() (PERSONAL_BANK.sol#65-77)
	- PERSONAL_BANK.balances (PERSONAL_BANK.sol#9)
